description: You are a sales representative using Odoo CRM. Log an internal note for the opportunity 'Warehouse Renovation - Gemini Furniture' summarizing a recent phone call. The note must be recorded as an internal log note and contain the following text exactly: 'Had a productive call with the client today. They confirmed budget approval for $45,000. Key requirements discussed: 1) Delivery must be completed by March 2025, 2) Need custom color options for the reception area furniture, 3) Requesting 15% volume discount. Client mentioned competitor bid from FurniturePlus at $42,000. Decision expected by end of next week. Follow up scheduled for Monday.'
